name: connect-4-solver
description: High-performance solver for a variety of board sizes using NNUE + alpha-beta pruning. Bindings for WASM, Node.js, and React Native.

scripts.install: node-gyp rebuild --jobs max || echo 'Native Addon compilation skipped/failed. Falling back to WASM bundle.'
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm run build:ts && npm run format:check && npm test
scripts.bench:native: g++ --std=c++20 -W -Wall -O3 -DNDEBUG -DUSE_PTHREADS -Inative -march=native -DBOARD_WIDTH_MACRO=7 -DBOARD_HEIGHT_MACRO=6 tools/benchmarks/bench_native.cpp native/Solver.cpp -o tools/benchmarks/bench_native_7x6 && g++ --std=c++20 -W -Wall -O3 -DNDEBUG -DUSE_PTHREADS -Inative -march=native -DBOARD_WIDTH_MACRO=8 -DBOARD_HEIGHT_MACRO=8 tools/benchmarks/bench_native.cpp native/Solver.cpp -o tools/benchmarks/bench_native_8x8 && g++ --std=c++20 -W -Wall -O3 -DNDEBUG -DUSE_PTHREADS -Inative -march=native -DBOARD_WIDTH_MACRO=9 -DBOARD_HEIGHT_MACRO=7 tools/benchmarks/bench_native.cpp native/Solver.cpp -o tools/benchmarks/bench_native_9x7 && g++ --std=c++20 -W -Wall -O3 -DNDEBUG -DUSE_PTHREADS -Inative -march=native -DBOARD_WIDTH_MACRO=10 -DBOARD_HEIGHT_MACRO=10 tools/benchmarks/bench_native.cpp native/Solver.cpp -o tools/benchmarks/bench_native_10x10 && ./tools/benchmarks/bench_native_7x6 && ./tools/benchmarks/bench_native_8x8 && ./tools/benchmarks/bench_native_9x7 && ./tools/benchmarks/bench_native_10x10

author: Tucker Willenborg
